title: Vertical Slabs Compat
description: Adds automatic compatibility for Quark's Vertical Slabs
body:
# Vertical Slabs Compat

Similar to Every Compat, this mods aims to fill in mod compatibility gaps by adding Quarks vertical slabs to all blocks that have a slab.

This work automatically and won't register ones that are already there

Altho it adds stuff for Quark the mod itself isnt required and you can also use it as standalone

This mod only purpose is to add vertical slabs so don't ask for vertical stairs or other micro blocks like crazyness like that. If you want those I suggest using this mod [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-placements#:~:text=Additional%20Placements%20is%20a%20Vanilla,the%20original%20blocks%20is%20modified.)
